# Philippine Online Dictionary

Philippine Online Dictionary is a community-built dictionary and language-learning site for Philippine languages. The site helps visitors explore dictionaries, contribute translations, and practice vocabulary sets.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/)
- [Dictionaries](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/languages)
- [Common Words](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/common-words)
- [Translator](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/translate)
- [Sets and Games](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/sets)
- [Community Contributors](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/users)
- [About](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/about)
- [Site Guide](https://www.philippineonlinedictionary.com/site-guide)

## Important Content Types

- Language dictionary pages use `/languages/{language-slug}`.
- Missing common word pages use `/languages/{language-slug}/missing-words`.
- Public vocabulary set pages use `/sets/{set-id}`.
- Public contributor profiles use `/profile/{user-id}`.

## Access

Public dictionary, set, profile, guide, and about pages are intended for indexing. Authenticated contribution, profile management, admin, and private learning-session pages are not primary citation targets.
